name: adw0rd/awesome-mcp-tools-mcp
description: Hosted MCP server exposing the [awesome-mcp.tools](https://awesome-mcp.tools) catalog of 2,000+ MCP servers as searchable tools — search, compare, top, trending, hot. Refreshed every 6h. Includes a CLI (`npx awesome-mcp search postgres`) and a stdio↔HTTP bridge (`npx -y -p awesome-mcp awesome-mcp-bridge`) for clients without remote-URL support. Endpoint: `https://awesome-mcp.tools/mcp` (Streamable HTTP, no auth).
